inputs.local_prompts:
Bobo stands on stage wobbling shyly from side to side as the crowd 
goes wild around it. A tiny dumpling places a flower crown on Bobo's 
head — Bobo's eyes go into happy crescents, cheeks glow bright pink. 
The crowd chants in the background. Bobo opens its mouth and says 
softly "bo...bobo?" in a confused but happy tone, tilting its whole 
round body to one side curiously. Confetti rains from above. 
Camera slowly circles around Bobo in full 360 pan. 
Warm golden particle effects float upward. | Camera flashes explode rapidly from all directions, temporarily 
whiting out the screen. Bobo spins in place trying to face all 
the microphones at once, tiny arms waving in confusion. 
Every time a reporter "asks a question" (indicated by question mark 
bubble), Bobo simply responds "bobo." or "bobo bobo?" 
with different intonations — happy, confused, proud, shy. 
Bobo's round body bounces with each response. 
Eventually Bobo gets dizzy, small spiral eyes, and tips over 
sideways with a soft thud. Cartoon birds circle its head. | Bobo sits perfectly still in the hot spring, rising and falling 
gently with slow relaxed breathing — its whole body bobbing up and 
down slightly in the water. Tiny steam wisps curl upward. 
Suddenly a rubber duck floats into frame and bumps into Bobo. 
Bobo opens one eye, looks at the duck, then says very softly 
and contentedly "...bobo." and closes its eye again. 
Camera slowly zooms out to reveal the peaceful spa setting. 
Soft twinkling music implied by floating musical notes in the air. | Bobo slurps noodles happily, cheeks puffed with food, eyes 
in happy crescents. Peaceful background music implied. 
Outside the window behind Bobo, the new monster rises slowly 
— buildings crumble silently. Panicked villagers run past the window. 
One tiny villager presses their face against the glass pointing 
desperately. Bobo pauses mid-slurp, slowly turns around. 
Eyes go wide. Long dramatic pause. Bobo looks at noodles. 
Looks at monster. Looks at noodles again. 
Then lets out a deep "...BOBO." sets down chopsticks. 
Cracks tiny knuckles. | Dramatic slow-motion sequence: Bobo steps out into the street, 
wind blowing (implied by floating sparkle particles). 
The new monster roars, shaking the camera. Bobo stands completely 
still for 3 full seconds — building tension. Then its body begins 
to glow, starting from the red dot on top, spreading downward 
in waves of golden light. Energy crackles around its tiny fists. 
Steam erupts from its top. Bobo's eyes slowly open — 
glowing white. It looks up at the monster. 
Takes one slow step forward. Opens mouth. 
Says with full conviction: "BOBO." 
Screen flashes white. Title card: "BOBO WILL RETURN 🥟⚡"
